items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of rate limiting per integration partner, but there is no concrete evidence or API reads provided that demonstrate this requirement has been implemented or validated. The linked use cases and personas do not include specific checks or validations related to rate limiting, leading to an inconclusive result. Therefore, without sufficient evidence, the validation cannot be completed.
